Landing.heroLede: The unofficial meeting point for athletes: swap pins and meet other delegations.
Landing.pinsBody: Post the pins you have and the ones you want. Find athletes ready to trade in person.
Landing.swipeBody: Swipe to discover athletes from other countries and agree on a trade.
Landing.shareNote: Share mipin with your team: the more athletes join, the better your exchange feed.
Landing.nonAffiliation: mipin is an independent, free project. It has no affiliation or relationship with the Central American and Caribbean Games Santo Domingo 2026 or its organizers.

SignIn.title: Sign in to mipin
SignIn.lede: Sign in to swap pins and meet athletes from other delegations.
SignIn.checkEmailBody: If {email} is a valid account, we sent you a sign-in link. Check your inbox.
SignIn.error: We couldn't complete sign-in. Please try again.

Onboarding.title: Create your profile
Onboarding.dobLede: mipin is only for users 18+. Confirm your date of birth to continue.
Onboarding.dobError: Enter a valid date of birth.

AgeWall.title: mipin is only for users 18+
AgeWall.body: We can't create your account. This decision is permanent for this account.

Share.label: Share
Share.message: I'm on mipin to swap pins with other athletes. Join me: {url}

Footer.nonAffiliation: Independent, free project with no affiliation with the Central American and Caribbean Games Santo Domingo 2026.
